case.title: ANDERSON v. ST. LOUIS COKE & IRON CORPORATION

opinion.h4: ANDERSON v. ST. LOUIS COKE & IRON CORPORATION, (1936)
opinion.h2: Amelia ANDERSON et al., petitioners, v. ST. LOUIS COKE & IRON CORPORATION et al.* No. 608.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Ford W. Thompson, of St. Louis, Mo., for petitioners.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 297 U.S. 727, 56 S. Ct. 496.[ Anderson v. St. Louis Coke & Iron Corporation (1936) ]
